executives.name: Dominik Rohe
executives.background: Managing Director of BlackRock, Inc. since 2005. Head of BlackRock’s Latin America & Caribbean region from 2016 to 2019. Head of BlackRock’s Institutional Client Business in Germany, Austria and Eastern Europe from 2013 to 2016.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Executive Officer of the Sponsor

executives.background: Managing Director of BlackRock, Inc. since 2011. Head of BlackRock’s Global Product Group for the Americas since 2019. Head of BlackRock’s Global Product Group for EMEA from 2011 to 2019.
